name: Attorney Stephen H. Gordon
description_short: San Antonio bankruptcy attorney offering Chapter 7 and 13 filing services alongside criminal, family law, and personal injury representation with 20+ years experience.
description_long:
Attorney Stephen H. Gordon founded The Gordon Law Firm, P.C. in San Antonio, Texas as a general practice firm with deep roots in bankruptcy law. The firm is located at 5820 IH-10 West, Suite 400 and has built its reputation over more than 20 years of legal practice. According to client testimonials, the firm has earned recognition including a Clients' Choice Award in 2016 and maintains positive reviews across multiple practice areas.

For bankruptcy clients specifically, The Gordon Law Firm handles both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings. The firm's approach emphasizes transparent communication throughout the bankruptcy process, with clients receiving regular status updates and direct access to Attorney Gordon rather than only speaking with paralegals or assistants. The firm explains each stage of bankruptcy proceedings in plain language and provides honest assessments of case prospects, including both strengths and weaknesses, from the initial consultation onward.

The firm distinguishes itself through accessibility and affordability. All initial phone consultations are free, and the firm explicitly advertises competitive rates, flexible payment plans, and acceptance of major credit cards. Written contracts detail all fees and costs in advance to eliminate surprise charges. The firm also accommodates remote clients through mail, fax, and email handling of documents when in-person office visits are impractical.

Prospective bankruptcy clients should note that while the website demonstrates competence and client satisfaction in this area, the firm operates as a generalist practice covering six practice areas. Bankruptcy is listed as one of several specialties rather than the exclusive focus. Clients seeking a dedicated bankruptcy-only firm may want to clarify the firm's current caseload and specialization level during the free consultation.
pros: Free initial phone consultation with no obligation
Honest assessment of case pros and cons provided upfront
Direct access to Attorney Gordon rather than only paralegals
Regular case status updates throughout the bankruptcy process
Transparent written contracts explaining all fees in advance with no hidden charges
Flexible payment plans and acceptance of major credit cards for affordability
20+ years of attorney experience in bankruptcy matters
Positive client testimonials specifically mentioning bankruptcy representation
cons: Generalist firm covering six practice areas rather than bankruptcy-exclusive focus
No information provided about bankruptcy-specific success rates or case outcomes
Limited details on website regarding Chapter 7 vs. Chapter 13 strategy or typical timelines
No pricing information or fee ranges disclosed publicly
Website does not specify attorney's educational background, certifications, or specialized bankruptcy credentials
best_for: San Antonio-area residents seeking affordable Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy representation
Individuals preferring transparent fee structures and direct attorney communication throughout filing
Out-of-state filers who can handle portions of their case through mail, fax, or email
Bankruptcy clients who also need complementary services like family law or estate planning
diagnosis: The Gordon Law Firm is best for San Antonio-area debtors seeking affordable, transparent Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy representation with direct attorney access. The main caveat is that bankruptcy is one of six practice areas rather than a specialized focus, so prospective clients should confirm current availability and expertise level during the free consultation.
services: Case assessment with pros and cons analysis
Preparation for bankruptcy hearings and testimony
Flexible payment plans for bankruptcy services
Remote document handling via mail, fax, and email
Written bankruptcy contracts detailing all fees

places_enrichment.formatted_address: 5820 I-10 Suite 400, San Antonio, TX 78201, USA
places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 5820 I-10 Suite 400, San Antonio, TX 78201-2851, USA

reviews.author: Linda Young
reviews.text: My husband and I have used Mr Gordon for several legal issues. Each time we obtained our desired outcome with very little stress and were more than pleased with the skill and knowledge he and his office staff demonstrated. Most recently we asked for his help with an adult adoption of our previous foster son. The paperwork was handled quickly and about two weeks later, the adoption was finalized. I highly recommend Stephen Gordon for any legal issues you may have!

reviews.author: Laura Ramirez
reviews.text: Mr.Gordon kindly assisted my mom with questions about her will, and I am writing this review on both of our behalf. He was incredibly professional, patient,  and kind throughout the entire process.  We both appreciated the time he took to explain everything clearly and thoroughly.  Highly Recommend!!

reviews.author: Roberta Stephenson
reviews.text: Stephen Gordon is very knowledgeable and professional.  He is also very kind.  I am very thankful to him as he has helped me so very much.  I will be using his services again in the future.

reviews.author: Mamie Robinson
reviews.text: Attorney Stephen Gordon has been of great assistance with an extremely difficult situation concerning a family matter. He is always  very calm, even when i was not. Working for a solution is always his goal. I have nothing but good things to say about him. He doesn’t give up. Just tries to get you where you need to be. I am forever grateful.  Thank you Attorney Gordon.

reviews.author: Jessica Yanez
reviews.text: Mr. Gordon has helped me with a few life changing issues. He and his staff have helped make these processes easy and stress free for me. I am grateful for all the constant communications, quick and efficient work. I highly recommend him. Anytime a friend or family ask if I know a good attorney, I mention Mr. Gordon and his amazing team.
